message:
perf: speed up internal/tmux tests from 156s to ~82s

Adds t.Parallel() to independent unit tests and changes TestHasDescendantWithNames
and TestGetAllDescendants to use os.Getpid() instead of PID 1, avoiding full
process tree walks that took 77s combined. Also uses t.Setenv() for cleaner
env var handling.

Closes: gt-ienv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
